## Editing.ICollectionManager interface

Manager for collection-level CRUD operations. Provides operations to create, delete, and rename collections within a sub-library.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface ICollectionManager<TBaseId extends string = string, TItem = unknown> 
```
